name: QRadar-0002 - Network Port Scan Detection
description: Detects reconnaissance activity by identifying a single source IP communicating with an unusually high number of distinct destination ports within 60 seconds. This pattern is consistent with automated port scanners such as Nmap or Masscan.

detection.event_name_filter: TCP SYN, UDP Probe, ICMP Probe
detection.aql: SELECT sourceIP, destinationIP, UNIQUECOUNT(destinationPort) as unique_ports, COUNT(*) as total_connections FROM flows WHERE sourceIP IS NOT NULL AND destinationPort IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sourceIP, destinationIP HAVING UNIQUECOUNT(destinationPort) >= 50 LAST 60 SECONDS

response.offense_name: Port Scan Detected from {sourceIP} - {unique_ports} ports scanned
response.offense_description: A single source IP has probed more than 50 distinct destination ports within 60 seconds. Indicative of automated network reconnaissance.

notes: Uses UNIQUECOUNT instead of COUNT(DISTINCT) for QRadar AQL compatibility.
author: Security Team
